response.text:

rationale: Peer r1c2 is above my share threshold (45% > 40%) and offering modest capacity (0.128 kWh) to below-mean peers; reciprocal sharing aligns with observed neighborhood coordination norm and my balanced intent.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
